ility":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"footballImplementation","outputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"","type":"address"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"getAllMatches","outputs":[{"internalType":"address[]","name":"","type":"address[]"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"matchAddress","type":"address"}],"name":"getSportType","outputs":[{"internalType":"enum addresses are mutable so bug-fixed implementations can be rolled      out to new match deployments without redeploying the factory. Existing proxies      are NOT auto-upgraded; their DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE holder must call      upgradeToAndCall directly (or use the UpgradeBetting script).      Atomic wiring: `createFootballMatch` / `createBasketballMatch` initialize the      match with the factory as temporary admin, then in the same transaction:        (1) set USDC + LiquidityPool addresses on the match,        (2) grant SWAP_ROUTER_ROLE and RESOLVER_ROLE,        (3) grant all admin roles to the intended owner + transfer Ownable,        (4) renounce every role held by the factory (DEFAULT_ADMIN last),        (5) call `pool.authorizeMatch(proxy)` to whitelist the match.      Step (5) requires the factory to hold `MATCH_AUTHORIZER_ROLE` on the pool \u2014      granted once at deploy time by the pool admin. After construction the      match is fully live and ready for bets; no manual cast-send sequence.","errors":{"OwnableInvalidOwner(address)":[{"details":"The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)"}],"OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address)":[{"details":"The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation."}]},"kind":"dev","methods":{"createBasketballMatch(string,address,address)":{"params":{"_matchName":"Human-readable match name","_oracle":"Address that receives `RESOLVER_ROLE` on the match","_owner":"Address that receives ownership + admin roles on the match"},"returns":{"proxy":"    Address of the newly deployed, ready-to-bet match"}},"createFootballMatch(string,address,address)":{"params":{"_matchName":"Human-readable match name","_oracle":"Address that receives `RESOLVER_ROLE` on the match","_owner":"Address that receives ownership + admin roles on the match"},"returns":{"proxy":"    Address of the newly deployed, ready-to-bet match"}},"implementations(uint8)":{"details":"Legacy callers used `factory.implementations(FOOTBALL)`. The modern         equivalents are `footballImplementation()` / `basketballImplementation()`.         Kept here so older deployment scripts compile unchanged."},"owner()":{"details":"Returns the address of the current owner."},"renounceOwnership()":{"details":"Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner."},"setFootballImplementation(address)":{"details":"Does NOT affect already-deployed proxies. Upgrade existing matches individually      via the UpgradeBetting script or upgradeToAndCall on the proxy directly."},"setWiring(address,address,address)":{"details":"Must be called before the first `createFootballMatch` / `createBasketballMatch`.      Pool admin must additionally grant `MATCH_AUTHORIZER_ROLE` on the pool to      this factory, otherwise the in-transaction `pool.authorizeMatch` call reverts."},"transferOwnership(address)":{"details":"Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner."}},"stateVariables":{"basketballImplementation":{"details":"Mutable \u2014 update via setBasketballImplementation(). Existing proxies unaffected."},"footballImplementation":{"details":"Mutable \u2014 update via setFootballImplementation(). Existing proxies unaffected."},"liquidityPool":{"details":"Must be set via `setWiring` before any match is created."}},"title":"BettingMatchFactory","version":1},"userdoc":{"events":{"BasketballImplementationUpdated(address,address)":{"notice":"Emitted when the basketball implementation pointer is updated"},"FootballImplementationUpdated(address,address)":{"notice":"Emitted when the football implementation pointer is updated"},"MatchCreated(address,uint8,address)":{"notice":"Emitted when a new match proxy is created (post-wiring)"},"WiringSet(address,address,address)":{"notice":"Emitted when the post-deploy wiring config is updated"}},"kind":"user","methods":{"FOOTBALL()":{"notice":"Back-compat shorthand for `SportType.FOOTBALL` / `SportType.BASKETBALL`,         accessible as `BettingMatchFactory.FOOTBALL` / `.BASKETBALL` from         legacy scripts that predate the named-getter API."},"allMatches(uint256)":{"notice":"List of all deployed match proxy addresses (insertion order)"},"basketballImplementation()":{"notice":"Current BasketballMatch implementation used for new proxy deployments."},"constructor":{"notice":"Deploy initial implementations and initialize the factory"},"createBasketballMatch(string,address,address)":{"notice":"Deploy, initialize, and fully wire a BasketballMatch UUPS proxy."},"createFootballMatch(string,address,address)":{"notice":"Deploy, initialize, and fully wire a FootballMatch UUPS proxy."},"footballImplementation()":{"notice":"Current FootballMatch implementation used for new proxy deployments."},"getAllMatches()":{"notice":"Retrieve all deployed proxy addresses (insertion order)"},"getSportType(address)":{"notice":"Get the sport type of a specific match proxy"},"implementations(uint8)":{"notice":"Back-compat accessor: look up an implementation address by sport id."},"isMatch(address)":{"notice":"Whether an address was deployed by this factory"},"liquidityPool()":{"notice":"LiquidityPool that new matches are wired to."},"matchSportType(address)":{"notice":"Sport type for each deployed proxy"},"setBasketballImplementation(address)":{"notice":"Point the factory at a new BasketballMatch implementation for future deployments."},"setFootballImplementation(address)":{"notice":"Point the factory at a new FootballMatch implementation for future deployments."},"setWiring(address,address,address)":{"notice":"Set the pool / USDC / swap router addresses that new matches are wired to."},"swapRouter()":{"notice":"ChilizSwapRouter granted SWAP_ROUTER_ROLE on every new match."},"usdcToken()":{"notice":"USDC token set on every new match."}},"notice":"Factory contract to deploy params._oracle: Address that receives `RESOLVER_ROLE` on the match
params._owner: Address that receives ownership + admin roles on the match

returns.proxy: Address of the newly deployed, ready-to-bet match

params._oracle: Address that receives `RESOLVER_ROLE` on the match
params._owner: Address that receives ownership + admin roles on the match

returns.proxy: Address of the newly deployed, ready-to-bet match

implementations(uint8).details: Legacy callers used `factory.implementations(FOOTBALL)`. The modern         equivalents are `footballImplementation()` / `basketballImplementation()`.         Kept here so older deployment scripts compile unchanged.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

setFootballImplementation(address).details: Does NOT affect already-deployed proxies. Upgrade existing matches individually      via the UpgradeBetting script or upgradeToAndCall on the proxy directly.

setWiring(address,address,address).details: Must be called before the first `createFootballMatch` / `createBasketballMatch`.      Pool admin must additionally grant `MATCH_AUTHORIZER_ROLE` on the pool to      this factory, otherwise the in-transaction `pool.authorizeMatch` call reverts.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

FOOTBALL().notice: Back-compat shorthand for `SportType.FOOTBALL` / `SportType.BASKETBALL`,         accessible as `BettingMatchFactory.FOOTBALL` / `.BASKETBALL` from         legacy scripts that predate the named-getter API.

allMatches(uint256).notice: List of all deployed match proxy addresses (insertion order)

basketballImplementation().notice: Current BasketballMatch implementation used for new proxy deployments.

constructor.notice: Deploy initial implementations and initialize the factory

createBasketballMatch(string,address,add.notice: Deploy, initialize, and fully wire a BasketballMatch UUPS proxy.

createFootballMatch(string,address,addre.notice: Deploy, initialize, and fully wire a FootballMatch UUPS proxy.

footballImplementation().notice: Current FootballMatch implementation used for new proxy deployments.

getAllMatches().notice: Retrieve all deployed proxy addresses (insertion order)

getSportType(address).notice: Get the sport type of a specific match proxy

implementations(uint8).notice: Back-compat accessor: look up an implementation address by sport id.

isMatch(address).notice: Whether an address was deployed by this factory

liquidityPool().notice: LiquidityPool that new matches are wired to.

matchSportType(address).notice: Sport type for each deployed proxy

setBasketballImplementation(address).notice: Point the factory at a new BasketballMatch implementation for future deployments.

setFootballImplementation(address).notice: Point the factory at a new FootballMatch implementation for future deployments.

setWiring(address,address,address).notice: Set the pool / USDC / swap router addresses that new matches are wired to.

swapRouter().notice: ChilizSwapRouter granted SWAP_ROUTER_ROLE on every new match.

usdcToken().notice: USDC token set on every new match.
